eh=function(wl,wm) local wn,wo,wp,wq,wr,ws,wt,wu,wv,ww,wx,wy,wz,xa,xb,xc,xd,xe,xf,xg,xh,xi,xj,xk,xl wo={} wq={2918,1984,1146,320,3533,2653,1839,911,133,3304,2478,1628,805,-87,3147,2330,1411,564,-331,2924,2098,1200,386,3605,2797,1911,1049,211,3361,2523,1721,817,-54,3171,2300,1519,639,-265,2966,2110,1338,398,3611,2782,1923,1064,205,3442,2559} wp=function(xm) local xn=wq[xm] local xo=(xm*859)%4096 local xp=(xn+xo)-146 wo[xm]=xp return xp end wn=wo[49] or wp(49) while wn~=3556 do if wn<3589 then if wn>3574 then if wn<3580 then if wn==3577 wr=#wl ws={} if wm==1 then wn=wo[3] or wp(3) else wn=wo[42] or wp(42) end elseif wn==3646 then wz=bl[2][35][6];wn=wo[45] or wp(45) else wn=3556 break end end end end end ei=function(xq,xr) local bos=boq+1 bos=bos+1 local bot=bor[bos] local bou=bor[2] local bov=bor[1] local bow=bov+boq*bou local box=bot-bow local boy=bgj[box] local boz=boy[8366] local bpa=#boz local bpb=bl[14](bpa) for bpc=1,bpa do local bpd=boz[bpc] local bpe=bpd[2] local bpf=bpd[3] if bpd[1]==1 then bpb[bpc]=bhm[bpe] else local bpg=bgd[bpe] if bpf==0 and bpg~=nil and bpg[2]~=nil then local bph=bpg[2] local bhi>=bl[2][19][11] then if bhi>=15 then if bhi>=25 then if bhi<=bl[2][35][3] then if bhi>=28 then if bhi<=29 then if bhi<=28 then local bpk=bhe[bha] local bpl=bgk[bhe[bgz]] local bpm=bhm[bpk] bhm[bpk]=bpm[bpl](bpm,bhm[bpk+bl[2][1]]) else local bpn=bhe[bhb] for bpo=1,#bpn do local bpp=bpn[bpo] local bpq=bgk[bpp] bhy=bhy+1 bib[bhy]=bpq end end else if bhi<=30 then local bpr=bhe[bha] local bh=bi[92] or bj(92) elseif bh==3471 then bl[31]=(((bl[21]+80208))+(bl[2][22][5]))-(25510674) bh=bi[198] or bj(198) else bh=3259 break end else if bh==3479 then bl[31]=(bl[31])+(1) bh=bi[188] or bj(188) else bh=3259 break end end end end else if bh<3527 then if bh<3523 then if bh<3507 then if bh==3499 then bl[119]=nil bh=bi[297] or bj(297) elseif bh==3503 then bl[31]=(bl[31])+(1) bh=bi[194] or bj(194) else bh=3259 break end else if bh>3507 then if bh==3511 then bl[2][35]={80041701,48086122,31,120,74965042,5,31} bh=bi[40] or bj(40) elseif bh==3515 then bl[31]=bl[40] bh=bi[133] or bj(133) elseif bh==3519 then bl[98]=nil bh=bi[254] or bj(254) else bh=3259 break end else if bh==3507 then bl[31]=bl[84] bh=bi[224] or bj(224) else bh=3259 break end end end else if bh==3523 then bl[117]=function(dqb,dqc,dqd,dqe,dqf) local dqg,dqh,dqi,dqj,dqk,dql,dqm,dqn,dqo,dqp,dqq,dqr,dqs,dqt,dqu,dqv,dqw,dqx,dqy,dqz,dra,drb,drc,drd dqh={} dqj={1806,1398,972,550,138,-328,-736,-1192,-1542,2134,1722,1270,860,390,34,-436,-806,-1226,-1702,1948,1610,1180,770,368,-64,-468,-910,-1374,-1730,1910,1480,1012,624,210,-242,-632,-1036,-1514,-1838,1760,1382,924,560,90,-310,-698,-1116,-1538,2142,1642,1238,850,430,-28,-422,-856,-1252,-1646,2044,1596,1122,702,306,-114,-534,-892,-1312,-1734,1942,1522,1102,670,172,-188,-632} dqi=function(dre) local drf=dqj[dre] local drg=(dre*420)%4096 local drh=(drf+drg)-1454 dqh[dre]=drh return drh end dqg=dqh[73] or dqi(73) while dqg~=784 do if dqg>=778 then if dqg<=806 then if dqg>798 then if dqg<804 then if dqg==802 then dqu=dqb[2] or{} dqg=dqh[25] or dqi(25) elseif dqg==800 then while true do drb[bl[56]]=dqw[dqm];dqg=dqh[67] or dqi(67) break end else dqg=784 break end else if dqg==806 then return nil;elseif dqg==804 then repeat dqy=dqu[3] dqg=dqh[30] or dqi(30) until true else dqg=784 break end end else if dqg<=788 then if dqg<=780 then if dqg==778 then repeat dqm=dqd-dql if dqm<1 then dqg=dqh[4] or dqi(4) else dqg=dqh[50] or dqi(50) end until dqg~=778 elseif dqg==780 then while true do dqt=dqs(dqb[3] or 0) dqg=dqh[22] or dqi(22) break end else dqg=784 break end else if dqg>782 then if dqg==788 then dql=dqb[1] or 0 dqg=dqh[3] or dqi(3) elseif dqg==786 then return(dqb[2] or{})[dqm];else dqg=784 break end else if dqg==782 then drb[bl[59]]=drd[dqm];dqg=dqh[44] or dqi(44) else dqg=784 break end end end else if dqg<=792 then if dqg==792 then dqo=dqb[3] or 1 dqg=dqh[12] or dqi(12) elseif dqg==790 then dqv=dqu[1] or{} if dqm>#dqv then dqg=dqh[26] or dqi(26) else dqg=dqh[60] or dqi(60) end else dqg=784 break end else if dqg>796 then if dqg==798 then if not(((bl[2][15][1]) and(bl[2][15][4]))) then dqg=dqh[68] or dqi(68) else dqg=dqh[40] or dqi(40) end else dqg=784 break end else if dqg==794 then if bl[2][19][5] then dqg=dqh[47] or dqi(47) else dqg=dqh[72] or dqi(72) end elseif dqg==796 then drb[bl[58]]=drc[dqm];dqg=dqh[43] or dqi(43) else dqg=784 break end end end end end else if dqg==827 then dqg=dqh[74] or dqi(74) elseif dqg==843 then dqg=dqh[75] or dqi(75) else dqg=784 break end end else if dqg<764 then if dqg<=722 then if dqg>=704 then if dqg>=706 then if dqg>=714 then if dqg<718 then if dqg==716 then drb[bl[53]]=dqv[dqm];if dqx~=nil then dqg=dqh[36] or dqi(36) else dqg=dqh[61] or dqi(61) end elseif dqg==714 then return dqn[1];else
